name: Steal Application Access Token - OAuth Token Theft and Illicit Consent
description: Detects application access token theft via illicit OAuth consent grants, high-privilege scope approvals, and CLI token file access for Azure CLI, gcloud, and AWS credentials.
query: event.dataset: "azure.auditlogs" and event.action: ("Consent to application" or "Add app role assignment" or "Add OAuth2PermissionGrant")
note: For CLI token theft: process.command_line: (*accessTokens.json* or *azureProfile.json* or *.azure/msal_token_cache* or *gcloud/credentials.db* or *aws/credentials*)
